name: Pipedrive
one_liner: Pipedrive is a sales-first CRM platform that helps teams organize pipelines, automate workflows, and manage leads and deals.

evidence.claim: Pipedrive provides a RESTful API with extensive documentation covering core functionality.
API access is included for free with every Pipedrive plan.
Search citation: Pipedrive API Integration - Build & Ship Faster with Merge

auth_notes: Authentication is handled via personal API tokens or OAuth 2.0.
mcp_notes: Merge.dev provides a Pipedrive MCP server implementation. No official server from Pipedrive was found.
api_notes: The API is RESTful, uses JSON, and covers the majority of core product functionality. Official SDKs exist for Node.js and PHP.
access_notes: Every Pipedrive plan includes an API token for free; developers can also request a separate sandbox account for testing.
